title: Ripples of the Past: Hermit Purple + Emperor Addon
description: A mod that adds Hermito Purple and Emperor stands to Ripples of the Past mod
body:
![Hermit Purple and Emperor Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91af54071b2bc9063c56c61b4e668e86f06a9e6a_0.webp)
# Hermit Purple arrives to Ripples of the Past
A Minecraft mod that adds the non humanoid stands Hermit Purple and the Emperor to [Ripples of the Past Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/ripples-of-the-past/versions) obtainable through Stand Arrow or in Hermit Purple case with hamon training if you enable it in the configs

# 1.16.5
## Hermit Purple
### Attacks
- ![Vine attack logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84f7b20d239b421d8865b85a8465b0041134e1ab.png) Vine attack (Shift variation ![shift Vine attack logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6414b9efded63c6b4e9ca5467d427d58e6664a2e.png) Vine binding attack)
- ![Grab entity logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e37ef1dd67d51914300386888de29f02b79a6f4a.png) Grab entity (With Sunlight Yellow Overdrive it can be followed by ![Overdrive action logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d720da77b33e247d4816515d05eda68872d9b3d3.png) OverDrive grabbed entity)

### Abilities
- ![Position divination logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ea009971dc86a92b80c1b2bbccb25dd787d9c82.png) Position divination: creates a map with the target's position, to get more zoom just shift
- ![Target selection logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30bdfa1134426dd7f5a15538323b6dafb1a8b597.png) Target selection: chose the target (entity, player or structure) you want to know it's position
- ![Vine action logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aad574c5adaf9b41b3f6354d82e6e6ded293662a.png) Vine: throw a vine to move towards a block (Shift variation ![Grab entity logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e37ef1dd67d51914300386888de29f02b79a6f4a.png) Vine grapple: throw a vine to catch an entity )
- ![Hermit Purple Barrier action logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85b5d8c24266daddd81f3f6f5a9858757563b9c6.png) Barrier: place up to 5 hamon charged vines (unlockable with Rope Trap)
- ![thorns shield logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2660412eda25efbb1b1b28ce8991262c1d3fc9f.png) Thorns block: Use Hermit Purple to block physical damage excluding projectiles

- ![Breathing logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d99e0c733183ef3076f5ff30cc6b48d76d63c721.png) Breath

### Fast Guide
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/SoqN2tnXmhI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Emperor
This stand has the capability to shoot bullets within 30 block radius that follows the target, the bullets power starts to decay at 12 blocks
### Abilities
- ![Target Action Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4bf118efe2351d63c571d3c1121ef053156e51ab.png) Select the type of random entities that the bullet would track within a 20 horizontal block range
-  ![Stand target selection](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8580b1214d5c0ba3253ba05797d91edf1248add4_0.webp) Make the entity you are looking at the target of your bullets within a range of 12 blocks
